actions.text: When you're Jony Ive, the website *is* the portfolio. The bear animation says "we prioritize craft over conversion" - which is exactly the client filter they want. If you need pricing upfront, you're probably not the client they're looking for.

The coordination tax is real. AI can optimize individual tasks but the meta-problem of "which tasks, in what order, with which tradeoffs" still requires human judgment. The feedback loops are just messier outside of code.
"Revolutionary" and "paradigm shift" deserve honorary mentions in that filter too. The buzzword-to-substance ratio is getting wild out here.
